title: The Great Episode 24 Plot Hole Fanwank Thread
display_title: The Great Episode 24 Plot Hole Fanwank Thread
wikitext:
[]: The Great Episode 24' Plot Hole / Fanwank Thread Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 19, 2006 5:23 pm So is it a plothole in 24' with Kaworu thinking Lilith=Adam athough Adam=on Gendou's hand, as the SEELE 24' cut reveals??

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Dec 19, 2006 5:29 pm Probably, and to make it worse it's not the only continuity error there. Gaghiel could sense Adam but Kaworu who has Adam's soul apparently can't. This is the problem with retconning. lol just noticed I mispelled retconning

[]: Post by Auriel » Tue Dec 19, 2006 5:50 pm That and how did Asuka come back, because she wasn't killed by third impact? Continuity errors shall always plague Eva fans.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 19, 2006 5:55 pm Um, she reverted to LCL off-camera, same with Misato & Ritsuko. Once their all in the Sea of LCL and Shinji rejects Instrumenality, "all lifeforms" have the ablity to retore their physical forms if they wish to.

[]: Post by Auriel » Tue Dec 19, 2006 5:59 pm Curses! Foiled again! But does that mean that absolutely EVERYTHING could come back, including dead things? (and on a side note, I thought Asuka got eaten by one of the MP Evas')

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Dec 19, 2006 6:07 pm Oh god now we're into how does 3I work CURSES. Anyways Lilith ignores things like temperal mechanics on a whim so who knows just who could come back. It's clear from EoE that souls linger in their bodies for some period of time after death since they all got turned into LCL. What happens after that is undisclosed. Why couldn't Fuyutsuki spill the beans on that one? As for Asuka getting eaten dunno, I figure something happened to her body since we didn't see her get tanged but her soul was still around for Lilith to snatch anyways reguardless of what happened to her physicaly.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 19, 2006 6:44 pm nigoki was speared after her and Asuka's arm was split in half:

[]: Post by MaggotMaster » Tue Dec 19, 2006 6:46 pm Asuka was in Pre-Instrumentality, Lilith probably got a hold of her soul somehow.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 19, 2006 7:23 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Probably, and to make it worse it's not the only continuity error there. Gaghiel could sense Adam but Kaworu who has Adam's soul apparently can't. This is the problem with reconning.

[]: Post by MaggotMaster » Tue Dec 19, 2006 7:25 pm Reichu wrote: Well, flex your fanwank muscles; there's got to be SOME way around it. ;) (Hell, if the Star Trek franchise can make the TOS smooth-headed Klingons canonical and come up with an overtly convoluted explanation for them, this should be a piece of cake.)

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 19, 2006 8:09 pm Hurray for Reichu fanwank!

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 19, 2006 8:19 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Hurray for Reichu fanwank!

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 19, 2006 8:48 pm Turns out I have a little bit of time on my hands so here goes: Kaworu has alzheimer's like Kaji so he thought Lilith=Adam! Seriously though...Hmmm. Prehaps, in a way, he did forget what the SEELE dudes/old men told him? I dunno, but maybe he somehow sensed Lilith was Adam via Rei's quantam magic? Ugh. Somebody else, please (I'm looking at you, Anonymous_Evafan and Shin Seikai!), fanwank something! :(

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Dec 19, 2006 9:21 pm Wait a sec, me? Reichu can't even come up with a good one for this.

[]: Post by Ornette » Tue Dec 19, 2006 10:21 pm [FANWANK] A bit to why Seele sent Kaworu: ep24' wrote: ??: Nerv, the organization formed to be Seele's executive branch... ??: It was created in order to put our script into practice. ??: But now, it has become an organization in the possession of one individual. ??: Precisely, we must take it back. ??: Before the promised day. KEEL: Nerv and the Eva series must be in their true forms. Ikari, you will bear the responsibility of your malfeasance towards Seele.

[]: Post by MaggotMaster » Tue Dec 19, 2006 10:36 pm given Ornette's analysis I say this should we moved to Discussion.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 19, 2006 11:45 pm I'm very confuzzled... Perhaps one of the biggest problems is why Kaworu would mistake Lilith for Adam at all. As noted, even Gaghiel could isolate embryo-Adam's "signature" while en route to Lilith. For Kaworu, who essentially IS Adam, one think that he wouldn't even consider the possibility that Lilith represents his actual body, for any number of reasons. (E.g., "lol i never looked like that") Ornette wrote: From here on, we're not in NPC territory

[]: Post by Ornette » Tue Dec 19, 2006 11:53 pm Reichu wrote: I'm very confuzzled... Perhaps one of the biggest problems is why Kaworu would mistake Lilith for Adam at all.

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 20, 2006 12:23 am Ornette wrote: When he was talking about Adam, he wasn't refering to the white being in front of him, but he was working out, out loud, (and this next bit here is in fanwank^2 territory) why Seele sent him, why Gendo had Adam, and what the fuck is up with these Lilim, having stated earlier his confusion on the matter ("I can't understand"). The Eureka moment is when he realized it was Lilith in front of him.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Dec 20, 2006 12:28 am Lets face it there is NO amount of fanwanking that'll fix this plothole. Star Trek had a century gap to work with we have 2 days.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Dec 19, 2006 5:29 pm Probably, and to make it worse it's not the only continuity error there. Gaghiel could sense Adam but Kaworu who has Adam's soul apparently can't. This is the problem with retconni
